tweet.text:
Circa 2013 with the legend himself and the late Great Super Snake.
Always bringing the energy and good vibes (Shoutout to the iconic Olympic memes) @SnoopDogg 😂
Photo Credits ⚾📸: Bruce Yeung Olympics Photo Credits 📸: Arturo Holmes/@GettyImages https://t.co/eILPUgOYza
@KelvinBeachumJr My brother from another mother. It's an honor and a blessing to do life with you!!
Thank you for your unwavering commitment to our first responders, military, law enforcement, healthcare workers, and every dedicated individual who works around the clock. Happy Labor Day! 🇺🇸
Had a wonderful time at @elevatemedinc's 5th annual Explosion of a Dream event, which celebrated impact and future physician leaders! https://t.co/5dOs7XcX2f
